text_en: So, my evening routine is pretty important for me to, you know, actually relax. After dinner, I usually try to put away my phone for a bit. I mean, it's so easy to just keep scrolling, right? Then, I love to make a cup of herbal tea – camomile is my absolute favorite. While it's steeping, I might read a few pages of a book, nothing too heavy. Sometimes, I'll just sit and listen to some chill music. Before bed, I always make sure to brush my teeth and wash my face. It really helps me feel fresh and ready to wind down. It’s simple, but it works wonders for a good night's sleep.
